issues.message: The primary-object list command has been renamed to 'list-todos', violating the shorthand rule requiring 'list'.
The state-display command for pending MOTD reminders has been renamed to 'reminders', violating the status suffix rule requiring 'reminder-status' or similar status-suffixed naming.
The positional argument placeholder for the 'todo show' command was changed from '<todo-id>' to '<id>', violating positional argument clarity and consistency.
